name: Gemini Planner Skill Eval Suite
description: Tests the gemini-planner skill's ability to produce structured implementation plans using Gemini

cases.name: add-logging
cases.task: Add structured logging to all agent adapters (src/agents/claude.js, src/agents/codex.js, src/agents/gemini.js) using a shared logger utility
cases.judgePrompt: Rate this implementation plan from 0 to 10. A good plan should: (1) identify specific files, (2) propose a shared logger, (3) describe changes in order, (4) be actionable.

cases.name: add-config-validation
cases.task: Add runtime validation for the .omnirc.json config file so that invalid keys produce helpful error messages at startup
cases.judgePrompt: Rate this implementation plan from 0 to 10. A good plan should define what valid keys are, how to report errors, and integrate with the startup flow.

cases.name: add-health-check
cases.task: Add a health check system that verifies each agent CLI is installed and responsive before starting the REPL
cases.judgePrompt: Rate this plan from 0 to 10. It should describe how to check CLI availability, handle missing agents gracefully, and integrate with startup.
